observations.name: PerformanceObserver longtask entry-type support
observations.notes: Runtime reported unsupported longtask entry type. Treat as capability-surface evidence, not behavior coupling by itself.

observations.name: prefers-reduced-transparency media feature parsing
observations.notes: Preference surface is privacy-relevant when queried or exposed in trace.

observations.name: modern or draft CSS parser warnings
observations.notes: Compatibility noise must not be overclassified without query and telemetry bridge.

observations.name: content-security-policy delivery-path limit
observations.notes: Policy-limited outcome contributes to reachability matrix only.

delivery_paths.notes: External collection lane was unavailable in the observed trace.
Collector-like request was limited by connect-src policy.
First-party telemetry or diagnostics lane returned HTTP 200 in the observed trace.

evidence_refs.description: User-provided browser console and network trace excerpt.
Classification note: privacy-relevant surface and delivery-path substrate; behavioral coupling unproven.

upstream_links.relationship: future runtime contract and eval fixture consumer
future controlled replay and evidence-bundle consumer

recommended_next_step: Capture stack and payload evidence in a controlled replay before promoting causality_status beyond unproven.
notes: This example deliberately separates browser-trace evidence from upstream repository attribution.
